events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure is a **critical** hazard — a formwork blowout/collapse risk under fresh concrete hydrostatic pressure. Decision is **fail**, with immediate stop-work, area evacuation, engineered re-design of bracing per ACI 347 pressure calculations, and re-inspection before any pour resumes.
